item.title: DCA - Electronic Cigarette Dealer v. 25N02913: TS - Selling or offering for sale a flavored vapor product intended or reasonably expected to be used for the consumption of nicotine.; TP - SOLD, OFFERE

item.description: Outcome: Dismissed No Violation/On the Merits
